content_body: Our family came up for fall break from school and it was the perfect getaway for us and our 2 girls. The views from the porch are amazing and we enjoyed the pool table and games. Others must check out Fall Branch Falls, Amicalola Falls, Appalachian Trail Rides, and Shaka Alpaca Farm! The trail ride was beautiful and perfect for beginners up hills and through streams. The alpaca farm gives private tours with chickens and goats too! Thank you for sharing your beautiful home with us... a wonderful family break to enjoyed together.
title: Wonderful Fall Break
